invoice-Dashboard.objective: The main objective of this dashboard is to provide a comprehensive view of the invoice performance of the company, allowing stakeholders to make informed decisions and identify areas for improvement.

Sales-Dashboard.objective: The Sales Dashboard provides a comprehensive view of the sales and revenue performance of the company, allowing stakeholders to make informed decisions and identify areas for improvement.

Purchase-Dashboard.objective: The Purchase Dashboard provides a comprehensive view of the purchase and inventory performance of the company, allowing stakeholders to make informed decisions and identify areas for improvement.

Heat cool Seat Dashboard.objective: The main objective of this dashboard is to understand the usage of heat and cool seats in cars, also data tells how the multiple levels are used by consumers

Seat occupancy.objective: The main objective of this dashboard is to track how the seat is occupied in cars
